374 K0200B_WT_NUM K0200B_WT_NUM K0200B Weight Number CHAR 3 The data in this column contains the resident's weight (in pounds). 0 Minimum

375 K0300_WT_LOSS_CD K0300_WT_LOSS_CD K0300 Weight Loss Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the resident had a weight loss 5% or more in the last month or 10% or more in last six months. -=Not assessed/no information
